meaning: adj.苗条的,纤细的,不足取的,无价值的,细长的v.变细,减肥
examples: She goes for tall slim men.
She has a beautifully slim figure.
The young woman was tall and slim.
Langhorne Slim and his band The War Eagles mix folk and blues with reckless punk-rock energy.
Though the recording industry remains in flux, Slim says he still finds confidence to keep going.
